name: Generic Alert
description: Universal IoT to Approval Center bridge. Converts sensor threshold violations into approval requests.
author: Zyrcon Labs

setup_fields.name: default_severity
setup_fields.label: Default alert severity
setup_fields.help_text: Default severity for new alert rules

setup_fields.name: critical_requires_approval
setup_fields.label: Critical alerts always require approval
setup_fields.help_text: Critical severity alerts always go to Approval Center

setup_fields.name: auto_resolve_info
setup_fields.label: Auto-resolve info-level alerts
setup_fields.help_text: Info alerts resolve automatically without approval
